start.message: Hi 👋 Welcome to ERLB Healthy Foods. We specialize in nutritious millet-based products. How can I assist you today?

products.message: Here are our healthy millet-based products.

biscuits.message: Our millet biscuits are made with natural ingredients and contain no harmful preservatives.

biscuitFlavours.message: We offer multiple healthy biscuit flavours made with millets.

premixes.message: Our millet premixes make it easy to prepare healthy meals quickly.

premixList.message: We offer premixes for dosa, pancakes, and other nutritious meals.

cooking.message: Each premix pack comes with simple cooking instructions for quick preparation.

otherProducts.message: We also offer other healthy food products made from natural ingredients.

benefits.message: Millets are rich in fiber, protein, and essential nutrients, making them an excellent choice for a healthy diet.

healthBenefits.message: Millets help improve digestion, support heart health, and maintain balanced blood sugar levels.

nutrition.message: Millets are high in fiber, antioxidants, and essential minerals like iron and magnesium.

whyMillets.message: Millets are gluten-free, highly nutritious, and a sustainable food choice.

pricing.message: Our product prices vary depending on the item and pack size.

buy.message: You can purchase our products directly from our website or authorized sellers.

trackOrder.message: Please enter your order ID to check the status of your order.

support.message: Our support team is happy to help you.

emailSupport.message: You can reach us at support@erlbfoods.com for assistance.

callSupport.message: You can call our support team at +91-XXXXXXXXXX during business hours.
